name: Breakfast Drink
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup fat free yogourt (fresh or frozen)
protein powder or nutritional yeast for extra pep (optional)
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the ingredients to a blender.
2. Blend on high for 10 seconds until smooth and frothy.
3. Carry the blended mixture with you while getting dressed for breakfast. Enjoy!
